name: Professional Business Bot
description: Production-ready bot template for commissioned projects with automatic cog loading and enterprise features
author: MultiCord Team

2.0.1: Fix: Added missing .env.example file for CLI auto-creation
Security: Now fully aligned with v2.0.0 token security standards
2.0.0: Enhancement: Added cogs/.gitkeep for directory structure
Consistency: Aligned with other templates for v2.0.0 release
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with automatic cog loading, structured logging, and production-ready features

notes: Designed as a foundation for commissioned Discord bot projects
Automatically loads all cogs from the cogs/ directory
Use 'multicord cog add' to install additional features
Supports both .env files and environment variables for configuration
Production-ready with comprehensive logging and error handling
